query: What are the docket numbers for the filings Google submitted to FERC between June and December 2024?
final_answer:
Between June and December 2024, Google (including Google LLC and Google Energy LLC) submitted **5 filings** to FERC across the following docket numbers:

| Filed Date | Docket Number(s) | Description |
|---|---|---|
| **06/28/2024** | **ER10-468-005** | Triennial Market Power Analysis for Central Region of Google Energy LLC |
| **09/19/2024** | **ER24-2891-000, ER24-2888-000, ER24-2890-000, ER24-2893-000, ER24-2894-000, ER24-2889-000** | Motion to Intervene of Google LLC (doc-less, covering 6 dockets) |
| **11/05/2024** | **ER10-2835-011** | Supplement to Notice of Change in Status of Google Energy LLC |
| **12/10/2024** | **AD24-11-000** | Post-Technical Conference Comments of Google LLC |
| **12/27/2024** | **ER10-2835-012** | Triennial Market Power Analysis for Southwest Power Pool Region of Google Energy LLC |

In total, **11 unique docket numbers** were involved across these 5 filings. The most active docket was **ER10-2835**, which saw two separate submissions (a Notice of Change in Status and a Triennial Market Power Analysis for the SPP region).
